name: the emitter writes nothing and does not crash when asked to render options for a tool whose native format is unsupported
command: out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/emit-tool-config.sh" --tool pmd --options '{"x":1}' --out c 2>/dev/null); ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && [ -z "$out" ] && echo emitter-noops-unsupported 1>&2
